# =============================================================================
# DevOps Toolbox — Python Development Tooling
# =============================================================================
# These packages are installed into individual pipx-managed virtualenvs at
# build time via:
#
#   grep -v '^\s*#' python-dev-requirements.txt \
#     | grep -v '^\s*$' \
#     | xargs -I {} pipx install {}
#
# Each package gets its own isolated virtualenv. Binaries are linked into
# /usr/local/bin and are available system-wide to all users.
#
# SCOPE: Universal Python development tools only. Project-specific libraries
# (requests, flask, pandas, etc.) are NOT included here — those belong in a
# project's own requirements.txt, installed directly via:
#   pip install -r requirements.txt
#
# WHY NOT A VENV: The container itself provides the isolation that venvs
# exist to solve. A venv is only necessary when working on multiple Python
# projects with conflicting dependencies in the same container session.
#
# VERSIONING: Pinned to exact versions (==) for build reproducibility.
# Update versions here when you want to bring in newer releases, then
# rebuild and publish a new image tag.
# =============================================================================

# --- Interactive shell -------------------------------------------------------
# A significantly friendlier REPL than the default python3 interpreter.
# Provides tab completion, syntax highlighting, and better error formatting.
# Run 'ipython' instead of 'python3' for interactive experimentation.
ipython==9.12.0

# --- Testing -----------------------------------------------------------------
# The standard Python test runner. Writing tests alongside code is a habit
# better built early than retrofitted later.
pytest==9.0.2

# --- Formatting --------------------------------------------------------------
# An opinionated, zero-configuration code formatter. Run 'black .' in your
# project directory to automatically format all Python files to a consistent
# style.
black==26.3.1
